# Contributing

**✨ Thank you for contributing to Animoo! ✨**

## Getting Started with Development

Make sure to install all the packages with `deno install`.

To launch the previewer for development, navigate to the directory of an example
and run the dev command:

```
ANIMOO_PROJECT_PATH=$PWD deno task dev
```

This command works on linux, you might have to adjust the environment variable
to run this on windows.

A nix flake is also provided that includes deno.

## Pull Requests

Submitting a pull request is awesome and fixing bugs or adding new features
really helps out! That being said, merging a PR isn't a free lunch. A PR asks us
to maintain the code, potentially for a long time in the future. So, be mindfull
that we'll only merge A PR once the code is clear, quality, and stable. I'll try
to give feedback if necessary.
